name: leads-generator-dashboard
description: Leads Generation Dashboard monorepo (backend, frontend, shared)

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend-build,backend-api,frontend -c yellow,cyan,green "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev:start --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently -k -n backend-build,backend-api -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev:start --workspace backend"
